# NoneElement

## Summary

Represents the absence of any element.

## Description

The NoneElement individual is used when no specific element applies.

## Metadata

- name: NoneElement
- type: Tool
- iri: https://example.org/rdf/terms/Core/NoneElement

## Property Values

- name: NoneElement
